facebook.caption: Tourists scroll past this one every time. Milana Beach Resort & Spa Phú Quốc sits on a private beach stretch most visitors never reach. Rustic bungalows, outdoor pool, a spa, and beach access without the resort-row crowds. 4.2 stars across 814 reviews says it holds up. Not flashy. Just good. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
